creator: heas@shrubbery.net
text:
Hi,
I know that this probably has something to do with my network and pkg.fo (149.20.1.201), but I need a little help to find the cause.

I receive horribly performance downloading binary ports from the aforementioned pkg host, roughly 8k/s.  If I force pkg.fo to resolve to 96.47.72.71, the performance is a little better, roughly 16 - 48k/s.  If turn off my low MTU link (1340b) with offers ~15Mb/s, the performance is what i expect for the secondary link, 3xT1.

The ends of the low-MTU link are forcing and doing fragmentation.  I do not normally see any problem with other hosts.

I see 3 fragments for some of the packets coming from 149.20.1.201.  Is that expected? Does it have a >1500 MTU?  Can you tell me what the path to 198.58.5.4 is from one of these hosts?

Any ideas welcome.

Thanks in advance!
